problem id: d062642e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  01011000 -> 00001011
  10110100 -> 10010110
  01101101 -> 10101101
  10010011 -> 01110010
  10111010 -> 01010111
  11001100 -> 10011001
  11010110 -> 11011010
  11010011 -> 01111010
  01101110 -> 11001101
  11110110 -> 11011110

query: 10010000
predicted answer: 00010010
